name: differencing-response-parsing
reason: All 5 rubric criteria are covered by tests in TestDifferencingResponseParsing and all pass: (1) test_valid_equivalent_response verifies a valid JSON with status 'equivalent' and all dimensions passing is parsed correctly; (2) test_divergent_when_any_dimension_fails verifies that a failing dimension results in 'divergent' status; (3) test_missing_response_file_error confirms a missing file produces a descriptive AgentError mentioning 'response file'; (4) test_malformed_json_error confirms malformed JSON produces a descriptive AgentError mentioning 'Malformed JSON'; (5) test_unknown_fields_tolerated confirms unknown fields at both top-level and nested levels are silently ignored via Pydantic's extra='ignore' config, ensuring forward compatibility.
